steps: Extraction of DBS
Extraction of Serum
LC parameters #1 - Reversed-Phase

In the whole DBS card Whatman 903 TM , retrieved 2 punches (1 punch = 3 mm disc) with a puncher WARNINGS: a punch must be entirely soaked in blood if possible, do not punch near the exterior of the blood droplets of the DBS
Add 200 µL of Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Methanol HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (4:4:2)
Put the 2 punches in a 1.5 mL Eppendorf vial
Vigourously vortexed during 00:01:00
Planar agitation : 01:00:00 , Room temperature , strength 8/10 Titramax 1000 (Shaker, Heidolph)
10000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes Sorvall Legend X1R (Centrifuge, ThermoScientific)
Transfert 150 µL of supernateant in a glass vial of 1.5 mL FinnPipette (F2, ThermoScientific)
Dry for 01:00:00 under vacuum at 40 °C

Dried extract is redissolved with 75 µL of: For reversed-phase analysis: Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (2:8) For HILIC analysis: Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (8:2) FinnPipette (F2, ThermoScientific)
Vigorously vortexed during 00:01:00 at Room temperature
Planar agitation: 00:30:00 , Room temperature , strength 8/10 Titramax 1000 (Shaker, Heidolph)
Transfert whole aliquot in a 200 µL 96-well plates (1 for reversed-phase; 1 for HILIC) FinnPipette (F2, ThermoScientific)
Transfert whole aliquot in a 200 µL 96-well plates (1 for reversed-phase; 1 for HILIC)
Planar agitation: 00:30:00 , Room temperature , strength 8/10, obscurity
Vigorously vortexed during 00:01:00 at Room temperature

Dried extract is redissolved with 100 µL of Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Isopropanol HyperSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (6:3:1)
Dry for 02:00:00 under vacuum at 40 °C
Transfert 900 µL of supernateant in a glass vial of 1.5 mL
10000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes
Planar agitation : 01:00:00 , Room temperature , strength 8/10, obscurity
Vigourously vortexed during 00:01:00
Add 50 µL of Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) then 950 µL of Isopropanol HyperSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor)
Put the 2 punches in a 1.5 mL Eppendorf vial

In the whole DBS card Whatman 903 TM , retrieved 2 punches (1 punch = 3 mm disc) with a puncher WARNINGS: a punch must be entirely soaked in blood if possible, do not punch near the exterior of the blood droplets of the DBS
Extraction of DBS
Make aliquots of 50 µL of serum FinnPipette (F2, ThermoScientific)
Add 150 µL of cold Methanol HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) ( -20 °C ) FinnPipette (F2, ThermoScientific)
Vigourously vortexed during 00:01:00
Planar agitation : 01:00:00 , Room temperature , strength 8/10 Titramax 1000 (Shaker, Heidolph)
10000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes Sorvall Legend X1R (Centrifuge, ThermoScientific)
Transfert 150 µL of supernateant in a glass vial of 1.5 mL FinnPipette (F2, ThermoScientific)
Dry for 01:00:00 under vacuum at 40 °C

Dried extract is redissolved with 100 µL of: For reversed-phase analysis: Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (2:8) For HILIC analysis: Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (8:2) FinnPipette (F2, ThermoScientific)
Vigorously vortexed during 00:01:00 at Room temperature
Planar agitation: 00:30:00 , Room temperature , strength 8/10 Titramax 1000 (Shaker, Heidolph)
Transfert whole aliquot in a 200 µL 96-well plates (1 for reversed-phase; 1 for HILIC) FinnPipette (F2, ThermoScientific)
Let it 00:20:00 at -20 °C
Extraction of Serum
Make aliquots of 50 µL of serum

Serum are extracted with a 1 mL Folch-like procedure Folch J, Lees M, Stanley. A simple method for the isolation .... Journal of Biological Chemistry. https://doi.org/10.1016/S0021-9258(18)64849-51957
Vigourously vortexed during 00:01:00
10000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes
Transfert 900 µL of supernateant in a glass vial of 1.5 mL
Dry for 02:00:00 under vacuum at 40 °C

Dried extract is redissolved with 100 µL of Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Isopropanol HyperSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (6:3:1)
Vigorously vortexed during 00:01:00 at Room temperature
Planar agitation: 00:30:00 , Room temperature , strength 8/10, obscurity
Transfert whole aliquot in a 200 µL 96-well plates (1 for reversed-phase; 1 for HILIC)
Let it 00:20:00 at -20 °C

Phase A: 200 mL + 5.5 mL * [Number of injections] Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) + 0.1% Formic acid >99% for LC-MS VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #84865.260 (CAS: 64-18-6) Stir vigorously during 00:01:00 by hand Ultrasound during 00:10:00 to remove air bubble Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)

Phase B: 200 mL + 3.8 mL * [Number of injections] Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) + 0.1% Formic acid >99% for LC-MS VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #84865.260 (CAS: 64-18-6) Stir vigorously during 00:01:00 by hand Ultrasound during 00:10:00 to remove air bubble Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)
Chromatographic System Ultimate 3000 (UHPLC, Dionex Softron, SRD-3400, Pump, Column Compartment, AutoSampler)
Install the column in the oven SecurityGuard ULTRA Cartridges (UPLC C18 2.1mm ID Columns, Phenomenex, AJ0-8782) Kinetex 1.7µm XB-C18 100A (Column, Phenomenex, 00F-4498-AN, LC Column 150 x 2.1mm)
Adjust the temperature ( 55 °C ) and let it heat the core of the column

Prepare the cleaning solvents (same solvent as the recovery solvent) & ultrasound it during 00:05:00 to remove air bubbles Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)

Prepare the piston “lubrication” solution (90% Methanol HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) and 10% Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) ) & ultrasound it during 00:10:00 to remove air bubbles Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)

Purge the system: 1 time at 100%A and 1 time at 100%B with open valve 2 times with open valve, 2 times with close valve at 50%A and 50%B Set the flow at 2 mL/min at 50%A and 50%B during 00:10:00 Check that the pression is stable; otherwise : purge again
Balancing the system: Gradually reach the flow rate of 0.5 mL/min at 2%B

Phase A: 200 mL + 2.6 mL * [Number of injections] Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) + 10 millimolar (mM) formiate ammonium VWR International (Avantor) + 0.1% Formic acid >99% for LC-MS VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #84865.260 (CAS: 64-18-6) Stir vigorously during 00:01:00 by hand Ultrasound during 00:10:00 to remove air bubble Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)

Phase B: 200 mL + 3.8 mL * [Number of injections] [95% of Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) & 5% of Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) ] + 10 millimolar (mM) formiate ammonium VWR International (Avantor) + 0.1% Formic acid >99% for LC-MS VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #84865.260 (CAS: 64-18-6) Stir vigorously during 00:01:00 by hand Ultrasound during 00:10:00 to remove air bubble Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)
Chromatographic System Ultimate 3000 (UHPLC, Dionex Softron, SRD-3400, Pump, Column Compartment, AutoSampler)
Install the column in the oven CORTECS UPLC HILIC 1.6µM (Column, Waters)
Adjust the temperature ( 40 °C ) and let it heat the core of the column

Prepare the cleaning solvents (same solvent as the recovery solvent) & ultrasound it during 00:05:00 to remove air bubbles Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)

Prepare the piston “lubrication” solution (90% Methanol HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) and 10% Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) ) & ultrasound it during 00:10:00 to remove air bubbles Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)

Purge the system: 1 time at 100%A and 1 time at 100%B with open valve 2 times with open valve, 2 times with close valve at 50%A and 50%B Set the flow at 2 mL/min at 50%A and 50%B during 00:10:00 Check that the pression is stable; otherwise : purge again
Balancing the system: Gradually reach the flow rate of 0.5 mL/min at 95%B

Mass Spectrometer Q-Exactive (Mass Spectrometer, ThermoScientific, HESI Source) MS Parameters : Scan Range: 58-870 m/z Resolution MS1: 70,000 Resolution MS2: 15,000 Polarity: POS or NEG Microscans: 1 Lock mass: None AGC Target: 1E6 Maximum Inject Time: 250 Sheath Gas Flow Rate: 50 Aux Gas Flow rate: 15 Sweep Gas flow Rate: 1 Spray Voltage (kV): +/-2.5 Capillary Temperature (°C): 325 S-lens RF level: 60 Aux gas Heater temperature (°C): 400

Cleaning the source: Set source temperature to 50 °C Let it "cool" 01:00:00 Unplug the Ion MAx API source with HESI probe attached Unscrewed the Sweep Cone and the capillary Immediately plug another cleaned capillary Clean the sweep cone with wet Aluminium oxide power Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Rinse thoroughly with Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) In a glass beaker, cover completely the Sweep Cone and the capillary with Methanol HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) Ultrasound during 00:10:00 Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA) Let it dry Replace the cone and the Ion Max API source with HESI probe Set source temperature back to normal
Reinstall the source & allow it to return to analysis conditions

Calibration: POS: Calibration Solution Pierce LTQ Velos ESI Positive Ion Thermo Fisher NEG: Calibration Solution Pierce ESI Negative Ion Thermo Fisher RMS < 0.4/0.4 in both ionisation mode Fusion 100T (syringe pump, Chemyx Inc.)

Prepared a solution for Performance Evaluation (during sequence injection): Solvent : Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (1:1) L-tryptophan Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T0254 (CAS: 73-22-3) at 10000 nanomolar (nM) Indoxyl-3-sulfate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) at 3750 nanomolar (nM) Kynurenic acid Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #K3375 at 25 nanomolar (nM) indole-3-Lactic Acid Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) at 500 nanomolar (nM)
Once calibrated, sequences can be run

Typical Sequences: Sample Type Injection Volume (µL) 1 Equilibrium(=sample) * 10 5 2 Blank Solvent 5 3 Performance Evaluation * 3 5 4 Blank Solvent 5 5 Sample QC 5 6 Sample *10 5 7 Sample QC 5 8 ... 5 9 Last Sample QC 5 10 Blank Solvent * 3 5

Metabolite Identification : m/z and RT of a chemical library ( IROA MSMLS, OAMLS, BACSMLS, FAMLS Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) ) checked with Thermo Scientific Xcalibur 4.416.14 MS² acquired on QC samples File exported : list of m/z and RT
Features detection: Peak Picking on all samples is done by using Workflow4Metabolomics Automatic attribution of the precedent list Workflow4Metabolomics 25.0 Galaxy doi: 10.1093/bioinformatics/btu813
Fusion of modalites = sorting redundancies: Only the best modality is kept for 1 metabolite, based on RT > Dead Volume (0-1 min) and/or lower CV(metabolite) on QCs

Phase A: 200 mL + 4.0 mL * [Number of injections] Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) / Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Isopropanol HyperSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) (5:3:2) + 10 mM formiate ammonium VWR International (Avantor) + 0.1% Formic acid >99% for LC-MS VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #84865.260 (CAS: 64-18-6) Stir vigorously during 00:01:00 by hand Ultrasound during 00:10:00 to remove air bubble Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)

Phase B: 200 mL + 3.8 mL * [Number of injections] Isopropanol HyperSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (90:9:1) + 10 mM formiate ammonium VWR International (Avantor) + 0.1% Formic acid >99% for LC-MS VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #84865.260 (CAS: 64-18-6) Stir vigorously during 00:01:00 by hand Ultrasound during 00:10:00 to remove air bubble Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)
Chromatographic System Ultimate 3000 (UHPLC, Dionex Softron, SRD-3400, Pump, Column Compartment, AutoSampler)
Install the column in the oven ACQUITY UPLC BEH C18 (2.1x100x1.7) (Column, Acquity)
Adjust the temperature ( 60 °C ) and let it heat the core of the column

Prepare the cleaning solvents (same solvent as the recovery solvent) & ultrasound it during 00:05:00 to remove air bubbles Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)

Prepare the piston “lubrication” solution (90% Methanol HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) and 10% Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) ) & ultrasound it during 00:10:00 to remove air bubbles Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA)

Purge the system: 1 time at 100%A and 1 time at 100%B with open valve 2 times with open valve, 2 times with close valve at 50%A and 50%B Set the flow at 2 mL/min at 50%A and 50%B during 00:10:00 Check that the pression is stable; otherwise : purge again
Balancing the system: Gradually reach the flow rate of 0.5 mL/min at 2%B
Mass Spectrometry

Mass Spectrometer Q-Exactive (Mass Spectrometer, ThermoScientific, HESI Source) MS Parameters : Scan Range: 250-1600 m/z Resolution MS1: 70,000 Resolution MS2: 15,000 Polarity: POS or NEG Microscans: 1 Lock mass: None AGC Target: 1E6 Maximum Inject Time: 200 Sheath Gas Flow Rate: 45 Aux Gas Flow rate: 10 Sweep Gas flow Rate: 1 Spray Voltage (kV): +/-3.5 Capillary Temperature (°C): 250 S-lens RF level: 25 Aux gas Heater temperature (°C): 350

Cleaning the source: Set source temperature to 50 °C Let it "cool" 01:00:00 Unplug the Ion MAx API source with HESI probe attached Unscrewed the Sweep Cone and the capillary Immediately plug another cleaned capillary Clean the sweep cone with wet Aluminium oxide power Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Rinse thoroughly with Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) In a glass beaker, cover completely the Sweep Cone and the capillary with Methanol HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) Ultrasound during 00:10:00 Ultrasonic Cleaner USC - TH (Ultrasound bath, VWR, 142-0084, 230V 50Hz 370VA) Let it dry Replace the cone and the Ion Max API source with HESI probe Set source temperature back to normal
Reinstall the source & allow it to return to analysis conditions

Calibration: POS: Calibration Solution Pierce LTQ Velos ESI Positive Ion Thermo Fisher NEG: Calibration Solution Pierce ESI Negative Ion Thermo Fisher RMS < 0.4/0.4 in both ionisation mode Fusion 100T (syringe pump, Chemyx Inc.)

Prepared a solution for Performance Evaluation (during sequence injection): Solvent : Acetonitrile HiPerSolv CHROMANORM VWR International (Avantor) / Water milliQ Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (1:1) L-tryptophan Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T0254 (CAS: 73-22-3) at 10000 nanomolar (nM) Indoxyl-3-sulfate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) at 3750 nanomolar (nM) Kynurenic acid Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #K3375 at 25 nanomolar (nM) indole-3-Lactic Acid Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) at 500 nanomolar (nM)
Once calibrated, sequences can be run

Typical Sequences: Sample Type Injection Volume (µL) 1 Equilibrium(=sample) * 10 5 2 Blank Solvent 5 3 Performance Evaluation * 3 5 4 Blank Solvent 5 5 Sample QC 5 6 Sample *10 5 7 Sample QC 5 8 ... 5 9 Last Sample QC 5 10 Blank Solvent * 3 5
Data Analysis

Lipid Identification : Lipids are identified based on an in-silico MS& spectral library on LipidSearch 5.0 ThermoScientific MS² acquired on QC samples Levels of confidence in the identification are classified in LipidSearch as: (A) “ all specific ions are assigned for the head groups and substituents” (B) “all specific ions are assigned for the head groups and some specific ions are assigned for substituents” or “some specific ions are assigned for the head groups and all specific ions are assigned for substituents” (C) “some specific ions are missing for the head groups and substituents” Compounds assigned as below D-level were not considered File exported : list of m/z and RT
Features detection: Peak Picking on all samples is done by using Workflow4Metabolomics Automatic attribution of the precedent list Workflow4Metabolomics 25.0 Galaxy doi: 10.1093/bioinformatics/btu813
Fusion of modalites = sorting redundancies: Only the best modality is kept for 1 lipid, based on RT > Dead Volume (0-1 min) and/or lower CV(lipid) on QCs
